species: Using novel mass spectrometry techniques, we identified six phosphorylation sites within the CTD of the archetypal linker histone Xenopus H1.0.
tissue: we isolated linker histones via perchloric acid extraction from X. laevis erythrocyte nuclei
sample_source: we isolated linker histones via perchloric acid extraction from X. laevis erythrocyte nuclei
cell_line: Linker histone H1.0b from X. laevis (here referred to as H1.0)
